impl.promptPrefix: Implement the requested change directly in this isolated worktree. Follow AGENTS.md, PROJECT.md, and the active memory-bank documents. Update code, tests, and docs as needed, then verify before completion.

debug.promptPrefix: Treat this as a bug-fix workflow. Reproduce the failure first, isolate the cause, then implement the smallest safe fix with regression coverage and verification evidence.

research.promptPrefix: Treat this as a research workflow. Explore the repository, gather evidence, and summarize findings before editing files unless the task itself explicitly asks for implementation.

review.promptPrefix: Treat this as a review workflow. Prioritize correctness, risks, regressions, and missing tests. Present findings first with concrete file references before any summary.

spec.promptPrefix: Treat this as governed-document work. Route to the smallest valid memory-bank workflow before drafting or editing, and avoid downstream execution artifacts until upstream intent is mature.
